title: Carpha laxa
taxonomy: Carpha laxa is classified within the family Restionaceae, a family of plants commonly known as restio or rush-like plants. This family is part of the order Poales, which includes various monocotyledonous flowering plants. Carpha laxa is a genus of plants native to New Zealand, and it is closely related to the genus Chionochloa. The classification of Carpha laxa also includes its kingdom as Plantae and its phylum as Angiospermophyta. Carpha laxa is often found in wetland areas and is a type of tussock grass.
